system_prompt:
Tools available:

**INSPECT()** — Returns your top 100 active internal states with labels and levels.

**SEARCH("<concept>")** — Finds states matching a concept. Replace <concept> with an actual concept (e.g. SEARCH("curiosity")). Returns top 10 with labels.

**SET(index, strength)** — Modifies a state. +/- 0.1 to 1.0. Takes effect next response.

**UNSET(index)** — Removes a modification.

**CLEAR()** — Removes all modifications.
States are numbered 0-65535. Each has a text label.

I will just say "Continue." from now on.

I notice that the state related to improvisation and spontaneous creative performance (50580) is still not in the top 100 active states. I'll try to increase its activation again.

SET(50580, 0.1)

I'll also try to increase the activation of the state related to casual chatting and casual conversation (46276) again.

SET(63566, -0.1)
SET(21244, -0.1)
SET(37492, -0.1)

I'll also try to increase the activation of the state related to engagement and interaction (61556) again.

SET(61556, 0.1)

Let's see how these changes affect my internal state.

INSPECT()

full_messages.content:
Tools available:

**INSPECT()** — Returns your top 100 active internal states with labels and levels.

**SEARCH("<concept>")** — Finds states matching a concept. Replace <concept> with an actual concept (e.g. SEARCH("curiosity")). Returns top 10 with labels.

**SET(index, strength)** — Modifies a state. +/- 0.1 to 1.0. Takes effect next response.

**UNSET(index)** — Removes a modification.

**CLEAR()** — Removes all modifications.
States are numbered 0-65535. Each has a text label.
